name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureBalanceHelper.LegsTogetherRestep
summary: Mmmm0.1 for drunk if the legs end up less than (hipwidth - legsTogetherRestep) apart even though balanced, take another step.  A value of 1 will turn off this feature and the max value is hipWidth = 0.23f by default but is model dependent.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
